fields.summary: Represents a single frame in an animated WebP sequence, pairing pixel data with a display duration.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoderFrame` associates an image (supplied as an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKBitmap>, <xref:SkiaSharp.SKImage>, or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap>) with a `TimeSpan` duration. Build an array of frames and pass it to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(System.ReadOnlySpan{SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame},SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions)> to produce an animated WebP file.

This struct is a value type and does not require disposal, but the underlying image data it references may need to be kept alive.

## Examples

```csharp
var frames = new SKWebpEncoderFrame[]
{
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap1, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
    new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap2, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)),
};
var options = new SKWebpEncoderOptions(SKWebpEncoderCompression.Lossy, 80);
using var data = SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(frames, options);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct with the specified bitmap and duration.

params.bitmap: The bitmap providing the pixel data for this frame.
params.duration: The duration for which this frame is displayed.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct with the specified image and duration.

params.image: The image providing the pixel data for this frame.
params.duration: The duration for which this frame is displayed.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame" /> struct with the specified pixmap and duration.

params.pixmap: The pixmap providing the pixel data for this frame.
params.duration: The duration for which this frame is displayed.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the duration for which this frame is displayed.
fields.value: The display duration of this frame.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the pixel data for this frame.
fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap" /> providing the pixel data for this frame.
